case_title: CUNHA, FRANCIS MICHAEL vs. ASHWORTH, ERIC PAUL et al

docket_entries.description: OSC CALENDAR OF FEB-20-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), FOR NOTICE OF PUBLICATION, ETC.
